subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: This is very good. Tea must be like this: good sugar, excellent tea, purified water, clean cup and in every way neat and organized. Otherwise, it is better not to drink it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار چای خوبی است چای باید اینطور باشد قند خوب چای خوب آب زلال پیاله پاک
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @personal instructions, @cleanliness and refinement
